params.name: Utopia
params.description:
On Nov 24, 1516 AD, Thomas More's Utopia was officially published.
Utopia was the first book on European socialist utopianism, written by Thomas More. The book depicts the experiences of the navigator Raphael in Utopia, where all property is publicly owned, people are equal, and the principle of distribution according to need is implemented, forming an almost perfect democratic public ownership model. The author used this book to express his ideal social system. The term "Utopia" ultimately b …
